skill: Ratios, rates, proportional relationships, and units
stem: Brandon earns $11.75 per hour at his part-time job. When he works h hours, he earns E dollars, where E is given by which of the following expressions?
rationale: Choice C is correct. Earnings equal hourly rate times hours worked, so E = 11.75h. Choice A is incorrect because it adds rate and hours instead of multiplying. Choice B is incorrect because h/11.75 divides hours by rate. Choice D is incorrect because 11.75/h divides rate by hours; both Choices B and D would have units that are not dollars.
